creator: gwq_uk@yahoo.com
text:
I saved a logfile as txt and used awk to extract some of the IP addresses that my FreeBSD box is talking to...

using `nslookup` here is the output:

40.227.224.13.in-addr.arpa      name = server-13-224-227-40.lhr61.r.cloudfront.net.
28.170.227.13.in-addr.arpa      name = server-13-227-170-28.lhr52.r.cloudfront.net.
1.200.159.162.in-addr.arpa      name = time.cloudflare.com.
123.200.159.162.in-addr.arpa    name = time.cloudflare.com.
123.34.120.185.in-addr.arpa     canonical name = 123.64-127.34.120.185.in-addr.arpa.
123.64-127.34.120.185.in-addr.arpa      name = time.netweaver.uk.
66.59.114.217.in-addr.arpa      name = ns0.luns.net.uk.
139.242.208.34.in-addr.arpa     name = ec2-34-208-242-139.us-west-2.compute.amazonaws.com.
36.75.98.34.in-addr.arpa        name = 36.75.98.34.bc.googleusercontent.com.
253.118.10.52.in-addr.arpa      name = ec2-52-10-118-253.us-west-2.compute.amazonaws.com.
20.188.122.92.in-addr.arpa      name = a92-122-188-20.deploy.static.akamaitechnologies.com.
121.255.86.99.in-addr.arpa      name = server-99-86-255-121.lhr3.r.cloudfront.net.
18.255.86.99.in-addr.arpa       name = server-99-86-255-18.lhr3.r.cloudfront.net.
